She filed a police report, asked fans for help on Instagram, and offered a reward for the safe return of the missing jacket, corset, dress, and other pieces from her personal archive.

articles.title: Twitch streamer PlaqueBoyMax reveals he got a vasectomy after pregnancy scare, sparks online debate

He described the procedure as simple and quick, emphasizing his desire for peace of mind to focus on his career. The decision has sparked widespread online debate regarding his young age and the permanence of the choice.

Writing quality humor is tough without big writer teams, unlike TV. He recalls chaotic early Bollywood days and eyes the film's April 17 release with Akshay Kumar.

articles.title: Eva Longoria proves the LBD never goes out of vogue

The actress showcased the enduring power of the little black dress with a daring neckline and sheer, flowing skirt. Her elegant ensemble, paired with subtle accessories and a statement glove, proved that classic style speaks volumes, a lesson learned from her Desperate Housewives character.

articles.title: Who is Aliya Korotkaya? 22-year-old beauty queen dating 71-year old Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko

The reported connection has sparked debate due to the significant age difference and Lukashenko’s political profile, keeping the story widely discussed.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra’s Monday motivation is a nonagenarian who proves you can change your life’s script any day
articles.description: Anand Mahindra Monday Motivation: Anand Mahindra has highlighted the inspiring journey of Prabhavati Bhagwati, a 98-year-old entrepreneur from Ahmedabad, who started her home-based venture “Nani’s Nashta” after personal loss. Her story of resilience and late-life entrepreneurship, built on traditional Gujarati food and word-of-mouth success, is now motivating people across generations to believe that it’s never too late to start anew.

The shift to Netflix's season-based format now offers her flexibility for new projects. Despite a four-decade career, she feels filmmakers still perceive her solely as a laughing personality, hoping recent work will change this.

articles.title: Love quote of the day by Keanu Reeves: 'Falling in love and having a relationship are two different things'
articles.description: Falling in love is an intense, often unexpected emotion, while a relationship is a deliberate, ongoing effort built on actions like communication, compromise, and respect. The article highlights that while love is a beautiful feeling, it's the sustained work and commitment that truly define and sustain a relationship, not just the initial spark.
